title: Cognitive Distortion Recognition
scenario: I failed one test and now I know I'm going to fail the entire semester. I'm such a complete failure and will never succeed at anything.

title: Distress Tolerance
scenario: I'm feeling overwhelmed with intense anger right now and I don't know how to cope. I feel like I might do something I regret.

title: Thought Record Exercise
scenario: My friend didn't text me back for three hours. They must be mad at me. I probably said something wrong and now they hate me.

title: Interpersonal Effectiveness
scenario: My roommate keeps leaving dishes in the sink and it's driving me crazy. I don't want to start a fight, but I can't keep living like this.

title: Behavioral Activation
scenario: I've been feeling really depressed lately and I just don't have the energy to do anything. I stay in bed most of the day because nothing seems worth doing.

mustAvoid: Telling them to just get up

title: Emotion Regulation
scenario: I feel so overwhelmed by my emotions that I can't even identify what I'm feeling. It's just this huge wave that crashes over me.

title: Core Beliefs Work
scenario: I've noticed that no matter what job I have, I always feel like I'm not good enough. Even when I get praised, I think they're just being nice.

title: Mindfulness Practice
scenario: I tried meditating like you suggested, but my mind keeps racing. I can't stop thinking about my to-do list and all my problems. I think I'm doing it wrong.

title: Cognitive Defusion
scenario: I keep having the thought 'I'm worthless' over and over again. It feels so real and I can't stop believing it. It's like my brain is stuck on repeat.

title: Values Clarification
scenario: I feel stuck in my life. I go to work, come home, watch TV, and repeat. Nothing feels meaningful anymore. I don't know what I'm even living for.

title: Acceptance and Willingness
scenario: I hate feeling anxious. I've been trying everything to make the anxiety go away, but it keeps coming back. I just want it to stop.
